privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target VPN connectivity request is synthetically generated via task_utils.sh and explicitly assigned workorderid 1004. The expected change request must include Campus Network Core Switch Replacement in its title, be set to a Normal change type, and correctly link to incident 1004. At least 1 change task must be attached, and the final status must be set to Requested for CAB review.
